subject: feat(ui): add plain-language descriptions to Discover metrics
body:
Each metric card now shows a short description explaining what it
measures and why it matters, in non-technical language. Descriptions
appear below the value and subtitle, helping users understand metrics
like "Net Code Growth" or "Focused Changes" without needing a guide.

Tags: ui, ux, accessibility, discover
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
